_comment: Leaderboard data contract for the AI Respondents Challenge. Overwritten by the competition scoring script; committing a new version triggers an Astro rebuild. Rows are pre-sorted by each board's primary metric (first numeric column); the page adds rank numbers. board.state: 'live' renders the table, 'locked' renders a reveal notice, 'final' freezes it.
note: Preview standings — automated baselines only. Team rows appear once submissions open on Monday.

boards.title: Prediction · In-domain
boards.subtitle: WVS · seen countries · held-out respondents
boards.metric: Normalized skill (accuracy above the majority-class baseline)

boards.title: Prediction · Out-of-domain
boards.subtitle: WVS · held-out countries (unseen populations)
boards.metric: Normalized skill (accuracy above the majority-class baseline)

boards.title: Selection · captured importance
boards.subtitle: How much of the true predictive structure your declared features recover
boards.metric: Captured importance vs. the permutation-importance oracle
boards.locked_message: Revealed at the Friday wrap-up — kept hidden during the week so the prediction contest stays primary and no one overfits the selection scorer.
